reason: The future inserted-path raw mode needs deterministic contig naming, header emission, and consumer warning semantics before this child can be represented in VCF.
required_behavior: Until that profile exists, downstream normalization must keep this case in an expected-reject or graph-aware sidecar stream.
blocked_until: An inserted-path coordinate profile defines CHROM, POS, contig header, and origin provenance for child sites inside insertions.
